name: White Sour Milk Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cream the shortening and white sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla.
4. Dissolve the baking soda in a separate bowl with 1 cup of sour cream.
5. Alternately add the dry ingredients mixture and the dissolved baking soda to the wet ingredients, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
6. Pour the batter into greased 8-inch layer cake pans.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes at 350°F until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
